# sharpee (npm package) — Claude Instructions

> Scoped to `packages/sharpee/`. See the root `CLAUDE.md` for project-wide policy.

## API Reference (GenAI)

**Before exploring source code**, check `docs/genai-api/` for auto-generated API declarations. These files contain full type signatures extracted from `.d.ts` files and are faster to read than navigating the source tree.

- `docs/genai-api/index.md` — navigation and quick start
- Read `engine.md` first for the `Story` interface, then `world-model.md` for entities/traits
- Also shipped in the npm package at `node_modules/@sharpee/sharpee/docs/genai-api/`
